pages.raw_text:
In his speech at the court house last night W. H. Acuf
profanely said


For Gods sake give me council that will not tie my
hands,


This prayer was repeated at regular intervals


Mr. Acuff was begging for Jack Snyder for j. S. Phil
lips and the other nominated by the Spokesman Re
vlew-Acuf party at the dctaton of the Washington
Water Power company and the Pacific States Telephone
company.


The notorious Joe Lindsey stood on the same platform
AND BEGGED FOR ACUTE VOTES


And


BEGGED THE VOTERS TO DEFEAT THE CHAR
TER AMENDMENT!


BY his speech and presence W. H Acu sanctioned the
plea OF Lindsey and Snyder to defeat the amendment
which gives the to grant franchises to the people,


Acuff asked the election of the pledged to the
Washington Water Power company and the telephone
company.


HE ASKED THEM TO ELECT JACK SNYDER
WHO, WITH LINDSLEY, TRIED TO DEFEAT THE
WILL OF THE PEOPLE AND KILL THE CHARTER
AMENDMENT!


1t shows clearly that Acuf is for the corporations and
against the charter amendment providing for referen
dunn of franchise to the people at the expense of the
poraton


1t proves conclusively that Acuf LIES when he says he
will give the people ''square deal.''


Last night Joe Lindsey said that if the charter amend
ment was voted through by the people the corporations
would get franchises for about $780, paid to the city.


JOE LINDSLEY AND JACK SNYDER VOTED
FRANCHISES TO THE CORPORATIONS FOR
WHICH THE CITY GOT NOTHING.


The Spokesman-Review in trying to steal the argu-
ments of The Press this morning. said the city ugged
into paying $4,000 for widening Hangman Creek bridge
for the of the Washington Water Power company


JOE LINDSLEY AND JACK SNYDER VOTED FOR
THAT STEAL!


Yet the Spokesman Reviews corporation candidate,
W. FL Acuf asks the people Of the Fourth ward to vote
for Jack Snyder and said:


For Gods sake give council that will not tie my
hands,


ALL BUT TWO MEN ON THAT CORPORATION
DICTATED TICKET of COUNCILMEN ARE PLEDGED
TO THE WASHINGTON WAITE RPOWER COMPANY.
Is it not plain that w. H. Acuff is trying put into the
council the who will help him carry the corporation
steals?
